prompt: Create cinematic fashion editorial photography in a bright minimalist bedroom, presented as a cinematographic composition analysis framework. Main frame: A young female model kneeling on a soft white bed, near a large window with sheer white curtains. She is positioned at the left third-line, aligned with the grid. Leaning back slightly, facing the window light with a calm, deep expression. The right side is filled with bright white light through the curtains, balancing the dark subject on the left. Lighting: Strong natural window light from the right creates high contrast. Face, upper body, and waist are sharply defined. Fill light on the left reveals shadow details. Warm, hazy morning light, soft highlights, realistic textures, gentle shadows, and softly glowing curtains. Composition Overlay: Add visible cinematography composition guide graphics, like a film school analysis framework. Includes: rule of thirds grid (thin green lines); red vertical line for the model's alignment; green circular focus markers around waist, face, and curtains; yellow eyeline arrows; red leading lines along the bed and wall pointing to the focus; cyan arrows showing left fill light; text labels: 'Rule of Thirds Alignment', 'High Contrast Focus', 'Eyeline Tracking', 'Focus 3', 'High Contrast Focus 1', 'Shadow Fill Source', 'Lines Leading Focus', 'White Block Balancing Frame'. Style: Luxury fashion editorial, soft cinematic texture, warm cream-white tones, beige wall panels, white bedding, subtle film grain, shallow depth of field, elegant composition, educational film analysis overlay. Camera: 35mm lens, medium wide angle, eye-level view, 16:9 widescreen.
